name: muesli-vscode
description: Live presence (cursors + participants) inside VS Code for muesli-linked markdown files. Presence only — content syncs via `muesli open` (ADR 0014).

muesli.webOrigin.description: Web app origin used for "Open in browser" when the linked server is on localhost (dev: vite serves the app on :5173 while the server is on :8787). Non-local servers open at the server's own origin.

muesli.serverOverride.description: Connect to this server instead of the one recorded in links.json (ws://, wss://, http:// or https:// forms all accepted).

muesli.displayName.description: Name shown to other participants. Defaults to your OS username.

scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm dlx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository
